title: Resolve increasing representation of all Massachusetts residents in the state house art collection
summary: By Ms. Comerford, a petition of Joanne M. Comerford that provisions be made for an investigation and study by a special commission (including members of the General Court) to review and study of the state house art collection. Tourism, Arts and Cultural Development.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on Tourism, Arts and Cultural Development
Hearing scheduled for 10/21/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in B-2
Accompanied a new draft, see S2740
